title: Luscious Brine-Dry Slovakian Pineapple Galette
description: A winey, molten, romantic Slovakian dish featuring pineapple, brine-dry, diabetic-friendly.

ingredients.name: Dried pineapple rings
ingredients.notes: rehydrated in 1/4 cup white wine and 1/4 cup sugar syrup

ingredients.name: Egg replacers
ingredients.notes: made from almond milk and tapioca starch

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375°F and prepare a bamboo tray with parchment paper.
Combine coconut flour, almond flour, xanthan gum, and salt in a bowl, then mix in coconut oil using a fork.
Mix dried pineapple rings with Slovakian honey, egg replacers, and Slovakian vanilla extract in another bowl.
Add rehydrated pineapple mixture to crust mixture and mix until combined.
Add water and turbinado sugar, then mix until a dough forms.
Press dough into a circle on the bamboo tray, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Bake for 45 minutes or until the edges are golden brown and the center is molten.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
